---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-banner">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>Help & Support</h1>
    <p>Find answers to common questions and get in touch with our team</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ ACCORDION -->
<section style="max-width:900px;margin:3rem auto;padding:0 2rem;">
  <h2 style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">Frequently Asked Questions</h2>

  <style>
    .faq-item { margin-bottom:1rem; }
    .faq-title {
      background: var(--map-navy, #1a2332);
      color: white;
      padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    }
    .faq-title:hover {
      background: var(--map-navy-light, #243044);
      border-color: rgba(201,162,39,0.3);
    }
    .faq-content {
      display: none;
      background: var(--map-bg-section, #f1f5f9);
      padding: 1.5rem;
      border-left: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227);
      border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: var(--map-text-muted, #64748b);
    }
    .faq-item.active .faq-content { display: block; }
    .faq-toggle {
      display: inline-block;
      transition: transform 0.2s ease;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
    }
    .faq-item.active .faq-toggle { transform: rotate(180deg); }
  </style>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I access the health facilities data?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Navigate to the <a href="country-data.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Country Data</a> page and select your country of interest.
      You can explore the interactive map to view facility locations and then download the full dataset in CSV or GeoJSON format.
      All data is freely available under the CC BY 4.0 license.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I find a nearby health facility?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Use our <a href="find-facility.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Find Facility</a> tool. Allow your browser to detect your location (or enter coordinates manually),
      select the service type you need, and the system will show you the nearest facilities offering that service on an interactive map.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>What file formats are available for download?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      We provide data in multiple formats:<br>
      &bull; <strong>CSV</strong> &mdash; Standard comma-separated values for spreadsheet analysis<br>
      &bull; <strong>GeoJSON</strong> &mdash; Geographic JSON format for web mapping and GIS software<br>
      &bull; <strong>Shapefile</strong> &mdash; Traditional GIS vector format for ArcGIS and QGIS<br>
      Contact us if you need data in another format.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>What is the license for this data?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      All health facilities data is licensed under the
      <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/" target="_blank" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)</a> license.
      You are free to use, share, and adapt the data with proper attribution. Please cite the HealthScope when using our data in publications or projects.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How frequently is the data updated?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Core facility lists are updated quarterly when new data sources become available. Service availability data
      is updated annually based on WHO SARA assessments and DHIS2 submissions. Coordinate validation is ongoing. Each dataset release includes
      a version number and changelog so you can track what has changed.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>What countries are currently covered?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      We currently provide comprehensive data for Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, Malawi, Nigeria, Botswana, and Benin.
      Coverage is expanding to additional Sub-Saharan African countries. Visit the
      <a href="country-data.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Country Data</a> page to see which countries are available.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I report data quality issues or errors?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      If you discover errors or inconsistencies in the data, we appreciate feedback!
      You can <a href="#report-issue" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">report a data issue</a> using our form below,
      or open an issue directly on our
      <a href="https://github.com/map-east-africa" target="_blank" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">GitHub repository</a>.
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT FORM -->
<section id="contact" style="max-width:900px;margin:3rem auto;padding:0 2rem 3rem;">
  <h2 style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">Get in Touch</h2>
  <div class="card-modern" style="border-top:4px solid var(--map-red,#c9a227);">
    <form style="display:grid;gap:1.5rem;">
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Your Name *</label>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Your full name" required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Email Address *</label>
        <input type="email" placeholder="your.email@example.com" required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Organization</label>
        <input type="text" placeholder="University, Ministry, NGO, etc." style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Subject *</label>
        <select required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
          <option value="">-- Select a subject --</option>
          <option value="data-access">Data Access Question</option>
          <option value="data-issue">Report Data Issue</option>
          <option value="partnership">Partnership Inquiry</option>
          <option value="technical">Technical Support</option>
          <option value="feedback">Feedback / Suggestions</option>
          <option value="other">Other</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Message *</label>
        <textarea placeholder="Tell us how we can help..." required rows="6" style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:1rem;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;">Send Message</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REPORT DATA ISSUE -->
<section id="report-issue" style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto 3rem;padding:0 2rem;">
  <h2 style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">Report a Data Issue</h2>
  <div class="card-modern" style="border-top:4px solid var(--map-amber,#f59e0b);">
    <form style="display:grid;gap:1.5rem;">
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Country *</label>
        <select required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
          <option value="">-- Select country --</option>
          <option value="tanzania">Tanzania</option>
          <option value="uganda">Uganda</option>
          <option value="zambia">Zambia</option>
          <option value="malawi">Malawi</option>
          <option value="nigeria">Nigeria</option>
          <option value="botswana">Botswana</option>
          <option value="benin">Benin</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Facility Name *</label>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Name of the facility with the issue" required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Issue Type *</label>
        <select required style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;">
          <option value="">-- Select issue type --</option>
          <option value="coordinates">Incorrect Coordinates</option>
          <option value="duplicate">Duplicate Entry</option>
          <option value="missing">Missing Information</option>
          <option value="outdated">Outdated Information</option>
          <option value="name">Facility Name Error</option>
          <option value="other">Other</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label style="display:block;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Description *</label>
        <textarea placeholder="Please provide details about the issue..." required rows="5" style="width:100%;padding:0.75rem;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;font-family:inherit;resize:vertical;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;padding:1rem;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;">Submit Issue Report</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EMAIL FALLBACK -->
<section style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto 3rem;padding:2rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(201,162,39,0.04) 0%,rgba(37,99,235,0.03) 100%);border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:12px;text-align:center;">
  <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Email Contact</h3>
  <p style="color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);margin-bottom:1rem;">Prefer direct email? Reach out to our team:</p>
  <p style="margin:0;font-size:1.1rem;">
    <a href="mailto:map-eastafrica@example.org" style="color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">map-eastafrica@example.org</a>
  </p>
  <p style="color:var(--map-text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;margin-top:0.5rem;">We typically respond within 2&ndash;3 business days.</p>
</section>
```
